states.name: Momoka
states.title: Mysterious Shrine Maiden
states.description: If you pass the torii gate and follow the road up to the shrine, you might catch a glimpse of Momoka Kamiya dancing in the main pavilion. A girl with adorable cow horns, the one rumored to be the symbol of good luck.

states.name: Momoka
states.title: Mysterious Shrine Maiden
states.description: People would laugh and cry with her, and love her like their own precious nadeushi statue. But one day she disappeared without a word, as if spirited away.

states.name: Momoka
states.title: Mysterious Shrine Maiden
states.description: At that time, a mysterious phantom started haunting the town, bringing its citizens rampage and sleepless nights. And the people prayed for the girl to return, for the power of luck to defeat their fears. They prayed to see that beloved smile again.
